blended.narrative: Indianhead Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,252 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
